context: Agent must produce a valid root biome.json with the correct schema reference, formatter config, and linter config as specified by the nx-biome-integration skill.

checklist.name: Schema reference present
checklist.description: The file contains a `$schema` field pointing to a `biomejs.dev/schemas` URL.

checklist.name: Formatter enabled with correct indent settings
checklist.description: formatter.enabled is true, indentStyle is "space", and indentWidth is 2.

checklist.name: files.ignoreUnknown set to false
checklist.description: files.ignoreUnknown is explicitly set to false.
